title: Comprehensive HRV estimation pipeline in Python using Neurokit2: Application to sleep physiology
author: Frasch

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: The methods section is structured as follows. First, following a brief rationale for the method I outline the HRV metrics computed. Second, I describe the implementation in Python. This section contains several elements defining the functions for executing the data loading, preprocessing and feature computation steps followed by data saving; as last step, I provide the code to tie everything together for a single step execution. At last, I present an application of the code to an open-source dataset and conclude with remarks for the broader usage.
